sources.title: Aleyda Solis - SEO Consultant, Author & Speaker
sources.note: Aleyda Solis's official homepage and consultancy page. European Search Personality 2018, founder of Orainti, author, and speaker with 200+ conferences in 30 countries.

sources.title: LearningAIsearch.com - AI Search Optimization Guides
sources.note: Aleyda Solis's free educational resource covering AI search optimization (GEO, AEO, LLMO), technical configurations, content optimization, and measurement.

sources.title: Crawling Mondays - SEO Video Series and Podcast by Aleyda Solis
sources.note: Aleyda Solis's YouTube-based video series distributed as podcast covering SEO tips, tutorials, reviews, interviews, and technical SEO implementation guidance.

sources.title: SEO. Las Claves Esenciales - Published by Anaya
sources.note: Aleyda Solis's published SEO book by Anaya Publishing House (November 2016), covering essential SEO principles and techniques.
